mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TO_DATE(GRP.REG_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') DESC) AS "LINE_NO" , GRP.LRN_GRP_ID AS "LRN_GRP_ID" , GRP.LRN_GRPNM AS "LRN_GRPNM" , TM1.TEAM_TOT AS "TEAM_TOT" -- , GRP.RGTR_ID AS "RGTR_ID" , USR.USERNM AS "USERNM" , GRP.REG_DTTM AS "REG_DTTM" , CASE WHEN TM1.TEAM_TOT = TM2.Y_TOT THEN 'Y' /* 구성완료 */ ELSE 'N' /* 임시저장 */ END AS "LRN_GRP_CMPTNYN" FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP GRP /* 팀 전체 COUNT */ JOIN (SELECT GRPSUB1.LRN_GRP_ID , COUNT(1) AS "TEAM_TOT" FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP GRPSUB1 JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM TBSUB1 ON GRPSUB1.LRN_GRP_ID = TBSUB1.LRN_GRP_ID GROUP BY GRPSUB1.LRN_GRP_ID) TM1 ON GRP.LRN_GRP_ID = TM1.LRN_GRP_ID /* 팀 저장완료 COUNT */ JOIN (SELECT GRPSUB2.LRN_GRP_ID , COUNT(1) AS "Y_TOT" FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_GRP GRPSUB2 JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM TBSUB2 ON GRPSUB2.LRN_GRP_ID = TBSUB2.LRN_GRP_ID AND TBSUB2.TEAM_CPST_CMPTNYN = 'Y' GROUP BY GRPSUB2.LRN_GRP_ID) TM2 ON GRP.LRN_GRP_ID = TM2.LRN_GRP_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON GRP.RGTR_ID = USR.USER_ID WHERE GRP.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
AND GRP.LRN_GRPNM LIKE '%' || #{lrnGrpnm} || '%'
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TeamLrnGrpMgrDAO.listTeamLrnGrpPaging 설명 : 학습 그룹 목록 페이징 */
/* SQL ID : TeamLrnGrpMgrDAO.countAbsnceUserHstr 설명 : 학습 그룹 목록 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM () Z
